# AllOverIt.EntityFrameworkCore.Pagination

## Purpose
Using AllOverIt.Pagination as the basis for advanced keyset-based pagination, this package provides additional extensions for use with EntityFramework Core.

## Package Metadata
- Project: Source/AllOverIt.EntityFrameworkCore.Pagination/AllOverIt.EntityFrameworkCore.Pagination.csproj
- Target frameworks: net10.0;net9.0;net8.0
- Tags: AllOverIt, Utilities, Query, EntityFramework, Pagination, KeySet
- Depends on: AllOverIt.EntityFrameworkCore, AllOverIt.Pagination

## Public API Signals (from source)
### Representative public types
- class QueryPaginatorExtensions

### Active namespaces
- AllOverIt.EntityFrameworkCore.Pagination.Extensions
